title: Production-Critical Scan Scopes
description: Declarative configuration for production-critical surfaces that must be scanned for stubs, mocks, and placeholders

scanScopes.description: List of production-critical directories to scan

path.description: Relative path from repo root to scan

critical.description: Whether this scope is critical (violations fail CI) or informational (warnings only)

description.description: Human-readable description of the scan scope

excludedPathSegments.description: Path segments that trigger exclusion from scanning

excludedFilenamePatterns.description: Filename patterns that trigger exclusion from scanning

scanPatterns.description: Patterns to detect in production code
